title: premna sulphurea
intro: Premna sulphurea, also known as the yellow chandana or yellow wood, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Premna sulphurea include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-diarrheal agent. Premna sulphurea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which are used to extract its medicinal properties.
